result.stdout:
Description:
  Extract test results from TRX files and upload to Azure Blob Storage

Usage:
  TrxUploader [options]

Options:
  --trx-path <trx-path> (REQUIRED)     Path pattern to search for TRX files (e.g., **/*.trx or TestResults/*.trx)
  --path <path> (REQUIRED)             Blob storage path (e.g., default/component/my-service)
  --storage-account <storage-account>  Azure Storage Account name [default: tbtechdocs]
  --container <container>              Azure Storage container name [default: test-results]
  --output <output>                    Optional: Output JSON file path (for local backup or testing)
  --skip-upload                        Skip uploading to Azure (useful for local testing) [default: False]
  --build-id <build-id>                The identifier of the build that ran this tool
  --build-status <build-status>        The status of the build (e.g., Succeeded, Failed, PartiallySucceeded)
  --build-name <build-name>            The name of the build
  --report-url <report-url>            URL to the test report in GitHub or other CI/CD platform
  --version                            Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                       Show help and usage information
